measurement_policy: Log economics only for providers that returned real normalized events from public samples. Measurements are current implementation costs, not theoretical minimums.

providers.implementation_path: Browser sidecar warm on https://webtrack.dhlglobalmail.com, then in-page app search submits to https://api.dhlecs.com/webtrack/v4/tracking without page reloads.
providers.notes: Manual page.evaluate(fetch) replay failed with TypeError: Failed to fetch, so current implementation uses the loaded carrier app as the sidecar request surface.

providers.implementation_path: System Chrome sidecar warm on https://www.purolator.com, then in-page tracking form submits to https://track.purolator.com/tracking-ext/v1/search without page reloads.
providers.notes: Manual page.evaluate(fetch) replay failed with TypeError: Failed to fetch. Static DOM config was removed because it returned zero events.

providers.implementation_path: Browser warm on https://business.poste.it, then browser-side POST to /online/dovequando/DQ-REST/ricercasemplice.
providers.notes: Warm page is heavy, but repeated same-session JSON lookups settle near 1.5 KB after initial app activity. Current amortization uses the average of three same-session lookups, including the first post-warm lookup.

providers.implementation_path: Browser warm on https://www.yuntrack.com, then browser-side signed POST to https://services.yuntrack.com/Track/Query.
providers.notes: Uses the public YunTrack app signing scheme and executes the request through page.evaluate(fetch). Warm app responses are captured only when HTTP 200; failed warm races fall back to direct signed browser fetch.

providers.implementation_path: Browser warm resolves DPD parcel key, then browser-side JSON fetches to /v1/parcels/{parcelKey} and /parcelevents.
providers.notes: Verified for the warmed tracking number. Additional numbers require their own warm until a browser-side parcel-key resolver is found.

providers.implementation_path: Browser warm on Canada Post detail page, then browser-side fetch to /track-reperage/rs/track/json/package/{n}/detail.
providers.notes: Warm page is heavy, but steady JSON lookup is about 5 KB and includes cross-border handoff events.

providers.implementation_path: Browser warm and steady browser-side fetch use compact Spee-Dee package progress HTML.
providers.notes: The compact progress endpoint is already very small, so warm amortization is negligible.
